A1V12 Yahoo Production v3.4

Binary MGK/MGV tactical sleeve · Sleeve: raw-close (matches Koyfin) · All other assets: buy-and-hold total return (adj-close) · Dividends reported separately
Tactical sleeve (MGK/MGV): price return (raw close) — matches Koyfin and brokerage. All other assets: buy-and-hold total return (adj-close, distributions reinvested). Portfolio dividend yield shown below in Current State.
Tactical signals use adjusted closing prices. Charts and metrics use raw closing prices. Open-price execution on trade dates.
PeriodDisplay: DailyMetrics use daily rowsDrawdown before downsample

Chart Rules

WindowDisplay frequencyCalculation basis
YTD, 1Y, 2YDailyFull daily values
>2Y and <8YWeekly, last trading observation of weekFull daily values
≥8Y or SIMonthly, last trading observation of monthFull daily values
DrawdownDownsample after drawdown is computedDaily running peak first

Dividend Income

Cash distributions calculated from exact daily shares in the NAV ledger. Yield on cost is intentionally not displayed — income grows with NAV. Prior Full-Year Income is the most comparable cross-period figure.
